items.title: Custom T Shirts for Men Women, Personalized Shirt with Image, Text or Logo, Customized T-Shirts Design Your Own
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: custom, shirts, women, personalized, image, text, logo, customized, design, your, own. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
